stories.title: Verstappen Takes On Nürburgring 24h Qualifiers — Red Flag, Grid Penalties, and Redemption

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Max Verstappen is BACK on the Nordschleife today for the Nürburgring 24h Qualifiers (NLS4, 17:30 CEST).

After his NLS2 disqualification over a tyre error, this is his redemption mission.

132 cars. 4 hours. Partly under the night sky. 🌙

#F1 #Nurburgring

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Qualifying at the Nürburgring was red-flagged after a crash today before Verstappen's NLS4 race.

A potential grid penalty for the Auer incident is still under investigation.

Nothing is ever simple on the Nordschleife. 😅

#F1 #Nurburgring

article.headline: Verstappen Returns to the Green Hell: Nürburgring 24h Qualifiers Begin Amid Red Flags and Grid Penalty Threat

stories.title: Ferrari's "Macarena" Revolution — Revised Wing and Private Monza Test Target Miami Comeback

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Ferrari's "Macarena" wing — rotates its upper flap upside-down when deployed — returns for Miami, revised.

The original caused rear instability for Hamilton + Leclerc in China.

The fix targets ~6 kW more power and higher top speeds. 🏎

#F1 #Ferrari

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Ferrari test their revised Miami aero package at Monza on April 22.

Why Monza? Its demanding energy recovery characteristics mirror what Hamilton and Leclerc will face in Miami.

The championship comeback starts there. Ferrari are 45 pts behind Mercedes.

#F1 #Ferrari

article.headline: Ferrari's "Macarena" Wing Returns: How the Revised Rear Wing Could Unlock Ferrari's Miami Comeback

stories.title: Hamilton's Race Engineer U-Turn — Santi Stays, Cédric Switch Delayed to Post-Miami

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Ferrari have made a U-turn: Carlo Santi, not Cédric Michel-Grosjean, will remain Lewis Hamilton's race engineer at the Miami GP.

Hamilton's reaction: "It's only going to be a few races. So early on, it's going to be switching up again — that's detrimental to me."

#F1 #Hamilton

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
Carlo Santi was Kimi Räikkönen's race engineer at Ferrari for years before stepping back.

Now he's Lewis Hamilton's man at Miami — at least for now.

Cédric Michel-Grosjean is still on gardening leave from McLaren. No official date for the handover.

#F1 #Ferrari

article.headline: Ferrari's Engineer U-Turn: Hamilton Warns of "Detrimental" Disruption as Carlo Santi Stays for Miami

stories.title: FIA's High-Stakes April 20 Vote — Energy Management Decision Looms for Miami

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Monday April 20: FIA holds the big vote on 2026 energy management fixes.

On the table: super clipping 250→350kW, qualifying energy target cut to 6MJ, ADUO tweaks.

If passed, changes go live at Miami (May 1-3). This rewrites the competitive order.

#F1 #FIA

article.headline: The Vote That Could Reshape F1: FIA's April 20 Energy Management Decision Explained

stories.title: 2026 F1 Championship Standings at the April Break — Antonelli's Lead, Ferrari's Chase, Red Bull's Recovery

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
2026 F1 standings at the April break:

🏆 Antonelli 72 (youngest leader in F1 history)
2️⃣ Russell 63
3️⃣ Leclerc 49
4️⃣ Hamilton 41

Constructors: Mercedes 135 | Ferrari 90 | McLaren 56 | Red Bull 16

Next: Miami, May 1-3. 🌴

#F1 #Formula1

article.headline: 2026 F1 Championship at the April Break: Antonelli's Historic Lead, Ferrari's 45-Point Chase, and Red Bull's Recovery Plan
